title: Allow the 'design-lap' hostname through Vite's dev-server host check
action: Add server.allowedHosts: ['design-lap'] to web/vite.config.ts so the dev server (already bound to 0.0.0.0 for LAN UAT retesting) accepts requests whose Host header is 'design-lap' instead of only localhost/its printed IPs. Dev-only config, no product logic change.

truths: web/vite.config.ts's server config includes allowedHosts containing 'design-lap'
prohibitions: No change to build.outDir, proxy targets, or any other existing config key

trace.outcome: Added server.allowedHosts: ['design-lap'] to web/vite.config.ts so the LAN-bound (0.0.0.0) vite dev server accepts the design-lap hostname for UAT retesting.
